name: Broccoli in Herbed Butter
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fresh broccoli, cut into spears
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook broccoli until crisp-tender.
2. Melt butter in a saucepan over low heat.
3. Add lemon juice, onion, salt, and herbs to the melted butter.
4. Drain the cooked broccoli and transfer it to a serving dish.
5. Pour the butter mixture over the broccoli and stir gently to coat.
